subject: people in north vernon are searching for plumbers
body:
Hi there,

I was looking at plumbing services in North Vernon and noticed Andis Plumbing doesn't show up anywhere online. No website, no Google listing with photos, nothing.

Meanwhile people in Jennings County are searching for plumber near me every day and finding someone else.

I'll show you exactly what needs to change so you get more calls from people searching for plumbing in North Vernon. Takes me about 10 minutes.

Want me to send it over?

Eric Lefler
